items.title: Reallusion Unlocks Limitless Creation: iClone Personal Debuts Alongside AI Studio Official Launch
items.excerpt: Reallusion released iClone Personal as a permanently free tier alongside the official launch of AI Studio, establishing a zero-barrier pipeline that bridges traditional 3D artistry with next-generation AI workflows for animation and VFX.

items.title: This is the Biggest AI Filmmaking Partnership Yet
items.excerpt: Curious Refuge's weekly AI filmmaking roundup covers the latest generative-video tools, studio partnerships and the arrival of interactive AI movies for creators.

items.title: Shanghai Film Festival Takeaways: Debut Directors Rule the Golden Goblet While AI Remakes the Industry Around Them
items.excerpt: Shanghai integrated AI more prominently into its programming than ever, with dedicated workshops and partnerships exploring generative video, image creation and audio applications, as panelists debated whether AI complements or threatens human creativity.

items.title: How Annecy is Welcoming Discussion on Industry Topics Including AI, Canal+
items.excerpt: The Annecy animation festival is hosting Think Tank AI4Animation, a day-long session laying the foundations for a white paper on AI in animation and how generative tools will reshape animator careers and workflows.

items.title: Annecy's MIFA Bets on Cross-IP, AI and Global Growth Amid Animation Financing Squeeze
items.excerpt: Annecy's MIFA market is examining AI's technological, legal and artistic implications under an 'artist-first, AI second' philosophy, aiming to integrate generative tools into animation workflows without diminishing human creative contributions.

items.title: French Animators' Group Demands Clarity on Annecy's Generative AI Policy
items.excerpt: A French animators' group is pressing Annecy for a clear generative-AI policy, advancing '3Cs' principles (compensation, control, consent) on the use of copyrighted work to train AI as the festival becomes a flashpoint for AI in animation.
